name: upi-offline-mesh-mern
description: UPI Offline Mesh - MERN stack port

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm start --prefix backend
